system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_get","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_Get]
( 
	@Filter    nvarchar(max), 
	@Kho       nvarchar(max), 
	@NgayThang date, 
	@TrangThai nvarchar(20)  = 'ALL'
)
AS
BEGIN


    DECLARE @TONKHO TABLE
    ( 
	    makho            nvarchar(50), 
	    mavt             nvarchar(max), 
	    keso			 nvarchar(max), 
	    soluong          decimal(18, 3), 
	    soluong_toithieu decimal(18, 3), 
	    ghichu           nvarchar(max), 
	    bom              nvarchar(200)
    )

    DECLARE @BOM TABLE
    ( 
	    mavt nvarchar(200), 
	    bom  nvarchar(200)
    )

    INSERT INTO @BOM( mavt, bom)
    SELECT mavt, 'NKI' AS BOM FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim GROUP BY  mavt
    UNION ALL
    SELECT madonggoi, 'DGO' AS BOM FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi GROUP BY madonggoi
    UNION ALL
    SELECT mact, 'SON' AS BOM FROM tr_dinhmuc_son GROUP BY mact

    IF @Filter = 'DAY'
    BEGIN
	   DECLARE @TMP TABLE
	   ( 
		   makho  nvarchar(50), 
		   mavt   nvarchar(max), 
		   sldau  decimal(18, 3), 
		   slcuoi decimal(18, 3), 
		   ghichu nvarchar(max)
	   )

	   INSERT INTO @TMP
	   ( 
			makho
		   , mavt
		   , sldau
		   , slcuoi
		   , ghichu
	   )
	   SELECT 
			makho
		   , mavt
		   , sldau
		   , slcuoi
		   , ghichu
	   FROM   tr_tonkho
	   WHERE  ngaythang = @NgayThang

	   INSERT INTO @TONKHO
	   ( 
			makho
		   , mavt
		   , soluong
		   , ghichu
		   , bom
	   )
	   SELECT 
			A.makho
		   , A.mavt
		   , slcuoi AS soluong
		   , a.ghichu
		   , C.bom
	   FROM   @TMP AS A
			LEFT JOIN @BOM AS C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
	   IF @Filter = 'CODE'
	   BEGIN
		  INSERT INTO @TONKHO
		  ( 
			    makho
			  , mavt
			  , soluong
			  , soluong_toithieu
			  , ghichu
			  , bom
		  )
		  SELECT 
			    A.makho
			  , A.mavt
			  , A.soluong
			  , a.soluong_toithieu
			  , a.ghichu
			  , C.bom
		  FROM   tr_tonkho_sum AS A WITH(NOLOCK)
			    LEFT JOIN @BOM AS C
			    ON A.mavt = C.mavt
	   END
	   ELSE
	   BEGIN
		  IF @Filter = 'WHS'
		  BEGIN
			 INSERT INTO @TONKHO
			 ( 
				   makho
				 , mavt
				 , soluong
				 , soluong_toithieu
				 , ghichu
				 , bom
			 )
			 SELECT 
				   A.makho
				 , A.mavt
				 , soluong
				 , soluong_toithieu
				 , a.ghichu
				 , C.bom
			 FROM   tr_tonkho_sum AS A WITH(NOLOCK)
				   LEFT JOIN @BOM AS C
				   ON A.mavt = C.mavt
			 WHERE  makho = @Kho
		  END
		  ELSE
		  BEGIN
			 IF @Filter = 'MAKE'
			 BEGIN
				INSERT INTO @TONKHO
				( 
					  makho
					, mavt
					, keso
					, soluong
					, bom
				)
				SELECT 
					  A.makho
					, A.mavt
					, A.keso
					, soluong
					, C.bom
				FROM   tr_tonkho_chitiet AS A WITH(NOLOCK)
					  LEFT JOIN @BOM AS C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
			 END
		END
	   END
    END

    IF @TrangThai = 'LONHON'
    BEGIN
	   SELECT 
			A.makho
		   , B.nhom
		   , A.mavt
		   , B.mota
		   , B.quycach
		   , B.mausac
		   , B.dvt
		   , A.keso
		   , A.soluong
		   , A.soluong_toithieu
		   , A.ghichu
		   , a.bom
		   , B.soluong1kg
	   FROM   @TONKHO AS A
			INNER JOIN tr_material AS B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
	   WHERE  A.soluong > 0
			AND B.xoa = 'N'
	   ORDER BY B.mota
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
	   IF @TrangThai = 'NHOHON'
	   BEGIN
		  SELECT 
			    A.makho
			  , B.nhom
			  , A.mavt
			  , B.mota
			  , B.quycach
			  , B.mausac
			  , B.dvt
			  , A.keso
			  , A.soluong
			  , soluong_toithieu
			  , A.ghichu
			  , a.bom
			  , B.soluong1kg
		  FROM   @TONKHO AS A
			    INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
			    ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		  WHERE  A.soluong < 0
			    AND B.xoa = 'N'
		  ORDER BY B.mota
	   END
	   ELSE
	   BEGIN
		  IF @TrangThai = 'BANG'
		  BEGIN
			 SELECT 
				   A.makho
				 , B.nhom
				 , A.mavt
				 , B.mota
				 , B.quycach
				 , B.mausac
				 , B.dvt
				 , A.keso
				 , A.soluong
				 , soluong_toithieu
				 , A.ghichu
				 , a.bom
				 , B.soluong1kg
			 FROM   @TONKHO AS A
				   INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
				   ON A.mavt = B.mavt
			 WHERE  A.soluong = 0
			 ORDER BY B.mota
		  END
		  ELSE
		  BEGIN
			 IF @TrangThai = 'ALL'
			 BEGIN
				SELECT 
					  A.makho
					, B.nhom
					, A.mavt
					, B.mota
					, B.quycach
					, B.mausac
					, B.dvt
					, A.keso
					, A.soluong
					, soluong_toithieu
					, A.ghichu
					, a.bom
					, B.soluong1kg
				FROM   @TONKHO AS A
					  INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
					  ON A.mavt = B.mavt
				WHERE  B.xoa = 'N'
				ORDER BY B.mota
			 END
		  END
	   END
    END
END


","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_tonkho","dbo.tr_tonkho_chitiet","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
